character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group ashore, involved in discussions about the timeline for returning to the ship.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Leader of the group ashore, making decisions about supplies and the mutineers' actions.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Member of the group ashore, participating in discussions about the stockade and mutineers.

character_dossiers.name: Alexander Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Master of the ship, listed among the faithful survivors of the ship's company.

character_dossiers.name: David Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Ship's doctor, listed among the faithful survivors of the ship's company.

character_dossiers.name: Abraham Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Carpenter's mate, listed among the faithful survivors of the ship's company.

character_dossiers.name: John Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Owner of the ship, listed among the faithful survivors of the ship's company.

character_dossiers.name: John Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: Owner's servant, landsman, involved in the stockade and mutineer activities.

character_dossiers.name: Richard Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: Owner's servant, landsman, listed among the faithful survivors of the ship's company.

character_dossiers.name: Thomas Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Owner's servant, landsman, shot by the mutineers.

character_dossiers.name: James Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Cabin-boy, rescued and safe after the mutineers' attack.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: Member of the group ashore, providing guidance to Jim Hawkins.
